description_long: This is a large, modern multi-family house complex with a flat roof and multiple interconnected rectangular volumes. The exterior features expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, balconies, and terraces, providing ample natural light and outdoor living spaces. The structure is surrounded by dense landscaping, including rows of trees and hedges that offer privacy and a natural boundary. The house includes several visible entryways, a garage, and a mix of open and enclosed outdoor areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a minimalist aesthetic. The use of large glass panels and open terraces suggests a focus on blending indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, multi-volume house complex with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, and dense surrounding landscaping.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rear and side of the house, showing multiple terraces, balconies, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the main entryway, garage, and a prominent central section with large windows and a landscaped approach.
description_view_2: The back view displays the extensive use of glass, multiple stories, and a clear separation between two main building volumes, with trees lining the perimeter.
description_view_3: This side view shows a more solid facade with fewer windows, a secondary entry, and the continuation of the landscaped boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door flanked by large windows and landscaping
